specs.title: 1. Aplikacja automatycznie wykrywa zapisaną sesję po wejściu
2. Wczytany stan autoryzacji ładuje odpowiedni wynik punktowy gracza
3. Wczytany stan omija początkowe etapy i od razu ładuje chroniony poziom zaawansowany
[R8] Saving from Pause menu hits backend API successfully
[R8] Saved game updates the SQLite DB correctly
[R9] Missing auth token results in 401 error
[R9] Incorrect auth token results in 401 error
[R9] Backend correctly responds with hasSave = false when empty
[R9] Backend correctly serves the latest save data
[R9] Reloading page correctly fetches save data from Backend via API
[R9] Continuing game fetches level index and score properly from Backend
[R8] Backend properly overrides duplicate saves for same user
[R9] Starting a new adventure from Home Screen ignores existing save
[Mocking] Przechwycenie /api/load wstrzykuje sztuczny stan gracza
[Mocking] Symulacja błędu 500 serwera podczas odczytu /api/load
[Mocking] Przechwycenie /api/save aby zweryfikować fallback do LocalStorage
[Mocking] /api/load zafałszowany powrót granicznej liczby punktów (np. 99999)
[Mocking] /api/save symulacja błędu 400 Bad Request
[Mocking] /api/load z uszkodzoną strukturą JSON (data: null)
[Mocking] Przechwycenie /api/load z opóźnieniem sieciowym (latency)
[Mocking] /api/load zwrot statusu 401 Unauthorized
[Mocking] /api/save odpowiedź serwera w formacie HTML zamiast JSON
continue journey visible when save exists before first load
continue journey hidden again after removing save and reload

save writes JSON that contains expected keys

[R7] Initial coins collected begins empty

[R4] Collecting same coin space twice does not double count
[R4] Multiple coins correctly stack scores
[R5] Reaching the end door triggers Level Complete overlay
[R5] Level transition to Level 2 sets correct levelIndex
[R10] Navigating to the end of the final level triggers Win Overlay
[R10] Player begins at expected start position
[R1] Player moves right when ArrowRight is held
[R1] Player moves left when ArrowLeft is held
[R2] Player executes jump with ArrowUp when grounded
[R3] Player gets affected by gravity pulling down
[R1] Player facing direction updates right
[R1] Player facing direction updates left
[R2] Player cannot jump when in air
[R3] Player is grounded when standing on a platform
[R1] Player stops completely if no movement keys are pressed
[R6] Player falling out of bounds triggers Game Over
[R3] Player respects left boundary
[R1][R2] Player can move left and jump simultaneously
[R1][R2] Player can move right and jump simultaneously
[R7] HUD shows correct level initially as STAGE 1 / 3
[R10] Pause menu appears when Escape is pressed while playing
[R10] Pause menu resumes game when Resume is clicked
[R7] HUD shows 0 score after game over and restart
[R6] Game Over state correctly resets game mechanics when starting new game
[R6] Restarting the game from Game Over leaves no residual coins
